channel.title: Preventative
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Preventative, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Women’s Heart Health Has Been Overlooked for Decades. Tech Is Finally Catching Up.
item.description: Brittany Barreto, Ph.D., is a podcaster, an entrepreneur, and a molecular and human geneticist. (In other words, she’s really smart.) Read her column ...

item.title: Trabajadores de salud pública renuncian antes de ir a Guantánamo
item.description: Oficiales del Servicio de Salud Pública que trabajaron en Guantánamo el año pasado describieron las condiciones en las que se encontraban los detenido...

item.title: Managing Chronic Hives That Come Out of Nowhere
item.description: Chronic spontaneous urticaria (CSU) , hives (urticaria) that last 6 weeks or longer (chronic) and have an unknown cause (spontaneous), can have a sign...

item.title: These 3 Ingredients Are A+ For Firmer Skin & Restoring Collagen
item.description: No skin-purging necessary.

item.title: Women Are 208% More Likely To Be Constipated Than Men — Here's Why
item.description: Yes, that's a real statistic. But hope isn't lost.

item.title: Try This High-Protein Version Of Butternut Squash Souap With Kale & White Beans
item.description: Roasting the squash brings out its sweetness, while white beans add a creamy touch.

item.title: Obamacare: el impacto de los costos en las inscripciones no se conocerá hasta dentro de varios meses
item.description: Los subsidios mejorados, que redujeron el porcentaje del ingreso familiar que se debía pagar por la atención médica y eliminaron el límite de ingresos...

item.title: Listen to the Latest ‘KFF Health News Minute’
item.description: The "KFF Health News Minute” brings original health care and health policy reporting from our newsroom to the airwaves each week.

item.title: Obamacare Sign-Ups Drop, but the Extent Won’t Be Clear for Months
item.description: Experts say Affordable Care Act sign-up data won’t be clear until people who were enrolled have paid — or haven't paid — their new, often much higher,...

item.title: La consulta con tu próximo médico de atención primaria podría ser solo virtual y agendada a través de IA
item.description: La falta de médicos de atención primaria es un problema nacional. Algunas grandes redes de salud están recurriendo a la inteligencia artificial en bus...

item.title: 5 Health Benefits Of Matcha & Creative Ways To Drink It
item.description: We consulted experts in Japanese cooking & nutrition for this complete guide.

item.title: To Mind Brain Health As You Age, Study Suggests Aerobic Exercise
item.description: We all want to look out for our brain health.

item.description: Primary hyperoxaluria (PH) is not just one disease but rather a group of three rare genetic disorders : PH1, PH2 and PH3. They are linked to different...
